trigger.name: CRPROD_DIMESION_CKNAME_TRG
trigger.body:
/********************************************************************************** * Copyright (C) 2009 Openbravo S.L.U. * Licensed under the Openbravo Commercial License version 1.0 * You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.openbravo.com/legal/obcl.html ********************************************************************************** * Contributor(s): ______________________________________. **********************************************************************************/ BEGIN IF AD_isTriggerEnabled()='N' THEN RETURN; END IF; -- Verificar registros duplciados IF INSERTING THEN -- Validación al insertar: no debe existir otra línea con el mismo nombre en el mismo padre IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM public.crprod_dimension WHERE UPPER(name) = UPPER(:NEW.name) AND ma_ccp_group_id = :NEW.ma_ccp_group_id ) THEN RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20000, '@scft_duplicatetrg@'); END IF;
ELSIF UPDATING THEN -- Validación al actualizar: tampoco puede quedar duplicado dentro del mismo padre IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM public.crprod_dimension WHERE UPPER(name) = UPPER(:NEW.name) AND ma_ccp_group_id = :NEW.ma_ccp_group_id AND crprod_dimension_id <> :NEW.crprod_dimension_id ) THEN RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20000, '@scft_duplicatetrg@'); END IF; END IF; END CRPROD_DIMESION_CKNAME_TRG
